title: Luffy Laughs Against Kaido
description: On pages 13–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Denjiro as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: There was a funeral and every thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Denjiro
dialogue.text: Wait, Boss Kyoshiro?! Where's your patented Pompadour?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well... this is going to be a long story...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: First, allow me to present the new Shogun of Wano!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 9 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
